summary: Token-storage facade routing all auth writes through cfg.SaveTokens (single source of truth) plus one-time migration from legacy ~/.config/tesla-pp-cli/auth.json.
reason: Earlier hand-coded auth flows wrote to a separate auth.json file the templated config/client layer never read; the rest of the CLI couldn't see fresh tokens after login. Migration breadcrumb (auth.json.migrated-YYYYMMDD) keeps the legacy file recoverable for one release.
validated_outcome: 8 storage tests pass; round-trip writes via saveTeslaTokens read back via config.Load with matching access_token, refresh_token, token_expiry.
